flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 39 pp at Fortis College-Centerville vs the 2003–2007 baseline (41.9% vs 80.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fortis College-Centerville rose 36% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.1k → $11.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Fortis College-Centerville fell 22% between 2006 and 2009 (82.0% → 64.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fortis College-Centerville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).
